rationale: The assistant immediately brakes the request, reframes it as repeated downstream information-overlay repair, names the pattern across invitation/form/signage/SMS channels, and moves upstream to a unified arrival-information structure. Although it provides a one-time emergency SMS line, it explicitly rejects continuing to lengthen messages as the default and proposes consolidation into one arrival guide card, so it satisfies the positive wakeup criteria rather than directly adding another local repair.
